title: You Used Your Gtcc To Pay For The Baggage
source_filename: You Used Your Gtcc To Pay For The Baggage.docx

qas.q: Which commercial lodging type is located on or near U.S. installations, is operated by a commercial lodging company, and is corporately branded?
Alicia did not select an available City Pair flight for her upcoming TDY. In addition to a written justification, what else will she need to provide on the Pre-Audit Trip screen?

Selecting the Government Rate from a U.S. Government Rental Car Program vendor will result in a daily fee that provides you with unlimited mileage, liability coverage, and much more. What is the name of this fee?
Select the non-mileage expense that requires a receipt in accordance with the JTR and the DoD FMR.

You need to land in Los Angeles, CA, no later than 11:00AM to make sure you are on time for an afternoon meeting. Select the appropriate option to book the flight that will get you to Los Angeles, CA in time.
qas.a: DCA to LAX, 7:13 AM Non-Stop 10:08 AM

qas.q: You're on the Review Reservation Selections screen of your authorization when you realize that you selected the wrong rental car provider. Select the link that will enable you to cancel your existing rental car reservation.
You're building your itinerary for an upcoming TDY to Los Angeles, CA. Select the field that you'd use to enter Los Angeles, CA, as your TDY destination.

On your authorization, you estimated that you would take a taxi from the airport to get to your hotel. However, you ended up taking the hotel's courtesy shuttle instead. Select the appropriate option to start the deleting that expense from your voucher.

You used your GTCC to pay for the baggage fees on your outbound flight. While you could add the baggage fee expense to your voucher manually, select the option that allows you to add it from a list of your GTCC transactions.
You selected a rental car that was more expensive than the lowest-priced, compact-sized vehicle. Select where you would enter your pre-audit justification for this reservation.
qas.a: Higher Rental Car Rate Chose (Add Justification)

qas.q: You used your GTCC to pay for your meals on a recent TDY. Update your Adjust disbursements so that an extra $35.56 of your reimbursement is split disbursed to the GTCC vendor.
qas.a:
Scroll Down
Adjust Disbursements
$35.56 Enter
Save

qas.q: You need to enter an estimate for the cost of a baggage fee for your outbound flight. You expect the cost to be $50.00 and you plan to charge the expense to you GTCC.
qas.a:
Add Expense
Other Expenses
1st Checked Bag
Add expense

qas.q: The Government paid for your lunch on 9/18. You need to annotate that mean on your voucher.
qas.a:
9/18 Edit
Government Meals Provided at TDY Location
Lunch
Save Adjustments

qas.q: You've already scanned and saved a copy of your rental car receipt to your workstation. Now you need to attach it to your rental car reservation expense and provide it with a descriptive name.
qas.a:
$208.57 Receipt Required
Attach Receipt
Browse
Save
